title: Chalk Friends
description: Two smiling chalk figures standing under swirling skies
description_zh: 两个微笑的粉笔人物站在旋转的天空下

images.caption: Two big chalk friends — one in cool blue stripes, the other in playful pink — grinning under wild swirling skies with tiny flowers floating between them
images.caption_zh: 两个大粉笔朋友——一个穿着酷酷的蓝色条纹，另一个穿着俏皮的粉红色——在狂野的旋转天空下咧嘴笑，小花在他们之间飘浮

title: Chalk Board Series
description: Chalk drawings on blackboard — night scenes and houses
description_zh: 黑板上的粉笔画——夜景和房子

images.caption: Vehicles driving through a starry night
images.caption_zh: 车辆行驶在星空之下

images.caption: A wild-haired character holding scissors
images.caption_zh: 一个头发乱蓬蓬的角色拿着剪刀

images.caption: A big house with a tiny person standing on top
images.caption_zh: 一座大房子，顶上站着一个小人

images.caption: Three buildings side by side — a neighborhood view
images.caption_zh: 三栋建筑并排——邻里风景

title: Backpack Collection
description: Three creative bags in bold marker strokes
description_zh: 三个用粗马克笔画的创意包包

images.caption: A castle sitting on top of a yellow backpack
images.caption_zh: 一座城堡坐在黄色背包上面

images.caption: A green backpack with cool sunglasses
images.caption_zh: 一个戴着酷酷墨镜的绿色背包

images.caption: A blue suitcase rolling on a crosshatch track
images.caption_zh: 一个蓝色行李箱在交叉线轨道上滚动

title: Stripy Snake House
description: A striped snake curling around a cozy little house
description_zh: 一条条纹蛇盘绕在温馨的小房子周围

images.caption: A colorful striped snake wrapping around an orange house
images.caption_zh: 一条彩色条纹蛇缠绕着一座橙色房子

title: Hermit Crab
description: Bold oil painting — a fierce hermit crab in red and black
description_zh: 大胆的油画——一只凶猛的红黑色寄居蟹

images.caption: A fierce red hermit crab in thick oil paint
images.caption_zh: 一只凶猛的红色寄居蟹，用厚厚的油彩绘成

title: Clock & Turtle
description: Handmade clock craft with a cute clay turtle
description_zh: 手工时钟工艺品，配有可爱的黏土乌龟

images.caption: A purple clock with numbers and a green clay turtle
images.caption_zh: 一个紫色的时钟带数字和一只绿色黏土乌龟

title: Magnifying Glass & Germs
description: Mixed-media collage — a magnifying glass peering at colorful germs
description_zh: 混合媒材拼贴——放大镜下五颜六色的细菌

images.caption: A bold magnifying glass made of cut paper and string, surrounded by clay germs in blue, red, and orange
images.caption_zh: 一个用剪纸和绳子做的大胆放大镜，周围是蓝色、红色和橙色的黏土细菌

title: Train
description: Colorful paper collage of a train with pom-pom wheels
description_zh: 彩色纸拼贴的火车，配有绒球车轮

images.caption: A bright red train built from geometric paper shapes and fuzzy pom-poms on a cheerful background
images.caption_zh: 一辆鲜红色火车，用几何纸片和毛绒绒绒球搭建，背景欢快明亮

title: Rabbit & Zeta
description: Thick oil-paint rabbit with Ultraman sticker friends
description_zh: 厚油彩兔子和奥特曼贴纸朋友们

images.caption: A grinning white rabbit painted in heavy strokes on a golden yellow background, with tiny Ultraman stickers scattered around
images.caption_zh: 一只咧嘴笑的白兔子用厚重的笔触画在金黄色背景上，周围散落着小奥特曼贴纸

title: Claw Machine Arm
description: Layered paper craft of a claw machine arm
description_zh: 分层纸工艺的夹娃娃机械臂

images.caption: A yellow and green claw machine with buttons and a grabbing arm, built from layered paper and crayon lines
images.caption_zh: 一台黄绿色夹娃娃机，有按钮和抓取臂，用分层纸和蜡笔线条搭建

title: Old Man
description: Two paper-cut elderly figures with clay hair
description_zh: 两个剪纸老人形象，配有黏土头发

images.caption: Two round-faced old folks — one in green, one in orange — with spiky white clay hair on a deep red background
images.caption_zh: 两个圆脸老人——一个穿绿色，一个穿橙色——白色黏土头发竖起，深红色背景

title: Castle
description: Arched blue castle skyline with clay decorations
description_zh: 拱形蓝色城堡天际线，配有黏土装饰

images.caption: Five tall towers drawn in marker on blue arch-shaped paper, decorated with orange clay blobs and tiny details
images.caption_zh: 五座高塔用马克笔画在蓝色拱形纸上，装饰着橙色黏土块和细小细节

title: Telephone
description: Four-panel telephone story with buttons and drawings
description_zh: 四格电话传声故事，配有按钮和绘画

images.caption: A zigzag book telling the story of sound through telephones — with clay buttons, marker drawings, and painted blobs
images.caption_zh: 一本折叠书讲述电话传声的故事——有黏土按钮、马克笔画和颜料斑点

title: Gloves
description: Two big gloves on a bubbly turquoise background
description_zh: 两只大手套在气泡蓝绿色背景上

images.caption: A red mitten and a magenta glove covered in pom-poms, with chalk bubbles floating all around on turquoise paper
images.caption_zh: 一只红色连指手套和一只洋红色手套上满是绒球，粉笔泡泡在蓝绿色纸上漂浮

title: Underwater World
description: Underwater scene with sea creatures and rainbow color strips
description_zh: 海底场景，有海洋生物和彩虹色纸条

images.caption: Fish and octopuses swimming through wavy blue waters, next to a page of rainbow-colored paper strips
images.caption_zh: 鱼和章鱼在波浪蓝色海水中游泳，旁边是一页彩虹色纸条

title: Kandinsky Cash Register
title_zh: 康定斯基的抽象收银机
description: Abstract Kandinsky-inspired drawing of a cash register
description_zh: 康定斯基风格的抽象收银机绘画

images.caption: Wild overlapping shapes in orange, pink, blue, and brown — an abstract cash register in Kandinsky style
images.caption_zh: 橙色、粉色、蓝色和棕色的重叠形状——康定斯基风格的抽象收银机

title: Letters
description: Bold letter painting spelling Y-O-G-A on blue-green
description_zh: 蓝绿色上用粗笔画拼写 Y-O-G-A 字母

images.caption: Big white letters spelling "Yoga" painted on a swirly blue and green watercolor background
images.caption_zh: 大白色字母拼写"Yoga"，画在蓝绿色水彩漩涡背景上

title: Bag
description: A round red handbag craft with rhinestone decorations
description_zh: 一个圆形红色手提包工艺品，配有水钻装饰

images.caption: A big red paper bag decorated with sparkly rhinestones, colorful pockets, and a green handle
images.caption_zh: 一个大红纸包，装饰着闪亮水钻、彩色口袋和绿色手柄

title: Kid & Ants
description: Clay ants in a dirt tunnel surrounded by a brown border
description_zh: 黏土蚂蚁在泥土隧道中，被棕色边框围绕

images.caption: Three black clay ants with googly eyes hanging out inside a brown dirt ring on yellow paper
images.caption_zh: 三只黑色黏土蚂蚁，长着大眼睛，在黄色纸上棕色泥土圈里玩耍

title: Car & Maze
description: Energetic swirls of a car and maze in mixed media
description_zh: 混合媒材中充满活力的汽车和迷宫旋涡

images.caption: A wild tangle of black lines, red spirals, and blue splashes — a car racing through a maze
images.caption_zh: 黑色线条、红色螺旋和蓝色飞溅的狂野纠缠——一辆车在迷宫中飞驰

title: Ladybug
description: Bold paint-splat ladybugs and creatures
description_zh: 大胆的颜料泼溅瓢虫和小动物

images.caption: Playful ladybugs and animal shapes in thick yellow, black, and green paint splats on white
images.caption_zh: 俏皮的瓢虫和动物造型，用厚厚的黄色、黑色和绿色颜料在白色上泼溅

title: Princess Meishan
description: Collage princess scene with rhinestone jewelry chains
description_zh: 拼贴公主场景，配有水钻首饰链

images.caption: Three colorful figures made of layered paper and clay, connected by sparkling blue rhinestone chains on a red background
images.caption_zh: 三个彩色人物由层叠纸和黏土制成，用闪闪发光的蓝色水钻链连接在红色背景上

title: Night Machines
description: Chalk drawings on blackboard — vehicles and ships in the dark
description_zh: 黑板上的粉笔画——黑暗中的车辆和船只

images.caption: Spaceships and boats glowing in the dark
images.caption_zh: 飞船和船只在黑暗中发光

images.caption: A long chalk car cruising under flowers and magnets
images.caption_zh: 一辆长长的粉笔车在花朵和磁铁下行驶

title: Space
description: Dramatic abstract oil painting of outer space
description_zh: 戏剧性的抽象太空油画

images.caption: A dark swirling mass of black and brown paint with fiery red splashes — a bold vision of deep space
images.caption_zh: 黑色和棕色颜料的旋涡，配有火红色飞溅——深空的大胆画面

title: Pipes
description: 3D cardboard pipe sculpture with colorful clay and paper
description_zh: 3D纸板管道雕塑，配有彩色黏土和纸

images.caption: A cardboard base covered with clay blobs, paper arrows, and tangled string pipes — the front view
images.caption_zh: 纸板底座上覆盖着黏土块、纸箭头和缠绕的绳子管道——正面视角

images.caption: More colorful clay flowers and paper arrows connected by orange string — the back view
images.caption_zh: 更多彩色黏土花和纸箭头用橙色绳子连接——背面视角

title: Hedgehog House
description: 3D cardboard hedgehog house with clay, sticks, shells, and a fence
description_zh: 3D纸板刺猬房，配有黏土、树枝、贝壳和围栏

images.caption: Top-down view of the hedgehog house — colorful sticks, clay bushes, and painted shells on cardboard
images.caption_zh: 刺猬房俯视图——彩色树枝、黏土灌木和纸板上的彩绘贝壳

images.caption: Front view — a cardboard box house with a window, yellow fence, and seashell garden
images.caption_zh: 正面视角——纸板箱房子有窗户、黄色围栏和贝壳花园

images.caption: Side angle showing the striped roof, clay trees, and rainbow shells around the house
images.caption_zh: 侧面角度展示条纹屋顶、黏土树和房子周围的彩虹贝壳

images.caption: Back view — green door, colorful blocks, and painted shells lining the yard
images.caption_zh: 背面视角——绿色门、彩色积木和院子里排列的彩绘贝壳

images.caption: Another angle showing the full house with sticks poking out like hedgehog spines
images.caption_zh: 另一个角度展示整座房子，树枝像刺猬的刺一样伸出

title: Base
description: Mixed-media base with clay figures, drawing, and pom-poms
description_zh: 混合媒材基地，配有黏土人物、绘画和绒球

images.caption: A tall spiral tower drawn in blue pencil, surrounded by colorful pom-pom planets and clay creatures
images.caption_zh: 一座用蓝色铅笔画的螺旋高塔，周围是彩色绒球星球和黏土生物

images.caption: Clay figures and pom-poms scattered across a canvas with blue pencil lines and a painted heart
images.caption_zh: 黏土人物和绒球散布在画布上，配有蓝色铅笔线条和一颗画的心

title: Watermelon House
description: Crayon and oil pastel drawing of a watermelon-shaped house
description_zh: 蜡笔和油画棒画的西瓜形状房子

images.caption: A big watermelon slice towering over a red and blue neighborhood, drawn in bold crayon strokes
images.caption_zh: 一大片西瓜高耸在红蓝社区上方，用粗蜡笔画成

title: Nian Beast
description: Fierce Nian beast in thick paint and pom-pom mixed media
description_zh: 凶猛的年兽，厚颜料和绒球混合媒材

images.caption: A wild orange and black Nian beast with pom-pom eyes, surrounded by gems and sparkles on a pink background
images.caption_zh: 一只狂野的橙黑色年兽，绒球眼睛，粉色背景上围绕着宝石和闪光

title: Basquiat-Style Boat
description: Bold Basquiat-inspired painting — a jungle boat scene
description_zh: 大胆的巴斯奎特风格画作——丛林船只场景

images.caption: A dense tropical scene in thick oil paint — dark trees, bright green cactus, and colorful clay shapes
images.caption_zh: 厚油彩中的茂密热带场景——深色树木、明亮绿色仙人掌和彩色黏土造型

images.caption: Colorful clay boats lined up on a painted surface — blue, pink, red, and green
images.caption_zh: 彩色黏土船在画面上排列——蓝色、粉色、红色和绿色

title: Boat
description: Vibrant yellow painting of a boat with bold pink and black lines
description_zh: 鲜艳的黄色船只画作，配有大胆的粉色和黑色线条

images.caption: A lively boat scene buzzing with music notes, giraffes, and swirling patterns on a bright yellow background
images.caption_zh: 一个热闹的船只场景，充满音符、长颈鹿和漩涡图案，明亮黄色背景

title: Sock Shop
description: Expressive oil painting of a sock shop storefront
description_zh: 表现力丰富的袜子店门面油画

images.caption: A busy yellow and green sock shop with bold brushstrokes, red flowers, and a stormy blue-green sky
images.caption_zh: 一家繁忙的黄绿色袜子店，粗犷笔触、红色花朵和暴风蓝绿色天空

title: Earthworm
description: Layered painting of an earthworm burrowing underground
description_zh: 蚯蚓在地下钻洞的分层画作

images.caption: A yellow earthworm curling through purple and brown earth under a dramatic red sky
images.caption_zh: 一条黄色蚯蚓在紫色和棕色土壤中蜿蜒，上方是戏剧性的红色天空

title: Squirrel House 2
description: Playful painting of squirrels living in a colorful treehouse
description_zh: 松鼠住在彩色树屋里的俏皮画作

images.caption: Brown squirrels climbing around a green house decorated with numbers, dots, and a Christmas tree on top
images.caption_zh: 棕色松鼠爬在绿色房子周围，装饰着数字、圆点和顶上的圣诞树

title: Kitchen
description: Mixed-media kitchen with clay vegetables on a painted canvas
description_zh: 混合媒材厨房，画布上有黏土蔬菜

images.caption: A pink and green kitchen scene with clay peas, garlic, and a big green leaf on swirly painted background
images.caption_zh: 粉绿色厨房场景，有黏土豌豆、大蒜和一片大绿叶在漩涡颜料背景上

title: Sea Castle
description: Oil painting of a pink figure standing by a stormy sea castle
description_zh: 一个粉色人物站在暴风海上城堡旁的油画

images.caption: A little pink clay person with button eyes standing on a dark rocky hill by the sea
images.caption_zh: 一个小粉色黏土人，有纽扣眼睛，站在海边的深色岩石山丘上

title: Kid & Ants 2
description: A smiling kid visiting the ants in their tunnel
description_zh: 一个微笑的小孩去蚂蚁的隧道探访

images.caption: A paper-cut kid with a big smile peeking into the brown dirt ring where two clay ants live
images.caption_zh: 一个笑容满面的剪纸小孩探头看棕色泥土圈里住着的两只黏土蚂蚁

title: Tank & Cannon
description: Bold red and blue marker drawing of a tank with cannons and a tiny crew
description_zh: 红蓝马克笔大胆绘制的坦克大炮，配有小小的乘员

images.caption: A massive red tank bristling with spotted cannons and blue gun barrels, with a little figure riding on top and numbers scrawled everywhere
images.caption_zh: 一辆巨大的红色坦克，布满斑点炮管和蓝色枪管，一个小人骑在上面，数字到处都是

title: Horse
description: Cut-out paper horse painted in cool grey-blue with a colorful saddle
description_zh: 剪纸马，用冷灰蓝色颜料绘制，配有彩色马鞍

images.caption: A proud grey-blue horse with striped legs and a curly mane, standing on a turquoise base — side view
images.caption_zh: 一匹骄傲的灰蓝色马，条纹腿和卷曲鬃毛，站在蓝绿色底座上——侧面

images.caption: The horse from above, wearing a bright yellow and green clay saddle with a pink clip — top view
images.caption_zh: 从上方俯瞰这匹马，戴着明亮的黄绿色黏土马鞍和粉色夹子——俯视
